## Derived concept
- Qubit-state `c` (`c[q]`) / РҡСғРұРёСӮРҪР°СҸ `c`: derived state of `c`, not a replacement for `c = a + b`; controlled non-collapse under uncertainty, without quantum consciousness or physical quantum computation claims.
